import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut s = 1
match list.get(tokens, 0)
when Some(t)
  match string.parse_int(t)
  when Some(n)
    a = n
  when None
    a = 0
  end
when None
  a = 0
end
match list.get(tokens, 1)
when Some(t)
  match string.parse_int(t)
  when Some(n)
    b = n
  when None
    b = 0
  end
when None
  b = 0
end
match list.get(tokens, 2)
when Some(t)
  match string.parse_int(t)
  when Some(n)
    s = n
  when None
    s = 1
  end
when None
  s = 1
end

mut out = ""
mut x = a
mut first = true
while x < b
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
  x = x + s
end
println(out)
